description: Abundance refers to the number of individuals within a population, while distribution refers to the geographic or spatial extent of habitats used by individuals from the population. Both are evaluated on a species level for GOOS Source: GOOS Essential Ocean Variable specification sheet, v2.0, March 2025. Vocabulary status and discussion — NERC EXV: https://github.com/nvs-vocabs/EXV/blob/main/README.md; ENVO minting: https://github.com/EnvironmentOntology/envo/pull/1568.
name: Seabirds abundance and distribution
